title: Fertility concern
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

examination.text: Specifies focused female examination including vital signs, BMI, thyroid and pelvic assessment and a clinically selected evaluation including semen, ovulation, tubal, and uterine assessment.
examination.rationale: Directly supports mapped BMI, thyroid, pelvic examination, semen, ovulation, tubal, uterine, and selected prior-test review.
examination.evidence_extract: Specifies focused female examination including vital signs, BMI, thyroid and pelvic assessment and a clinically selected evaluation including semen, ovulation, tubal, and uterine assessment.

source.title: Guideline for the prevention, diagnosis and treatment of infertility

exact_section.heading: Chapter 3.3 — focused examination and diagnostic evaluation

investigations.text: Supports concurrent female and male evaluation, duration trying to conceive, menstrual, obstetric, gynaecologic, medical, surgical, medication, lifestyle, sexual, STI, partner, and prior-investigation history.
investigations.rationale: Directly supports mapped fertility-concern, duration, menstrual, obstetric, partner, gynaecologic, medical, surgical, medication, lifestyle, sexual, and prior-investigation history.
investigations.evidence_extract: Supports concurrent female and male evaluation, duration trying to conceive, menstrual, obstetric, gynaecologic, medical, surgical, medication, lifestyle, sexual, STI, partner, and prior-investigation history.

referral.text: Requires preference-sensitive discussion, psychosocial support, transparent information, and consent-based collaborative decisions.
referral.rationale: Directly supports mapped counselling, preferences, psychosocial support, referral discussion, and questions as clinician-documented decisions.

source_limitations: Recurrent pregnancy loss aliases, fixed follow-up intervals, hyperandrogenism examination, UAE legal or referral requirements, and treatment advice remain unsupported.
No infertility cause or diagnosis may be inferred from the workflow.
Qualified clinician review has not been completed.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
